notes: Form-builder SaaS homepage. Meta-interesting: a tool for building forms has its own forms. Auth via header login button. CTA-heavy landing page with multiple Get Started buttons. Search in docs/help section. Moderate DOM complexity with animations and lazy-loaded sections.

endpoints.label: Login
endpoints.description: Header Login button linking to Typeform authentication page

endpoints.label: Sign Up / Get Started Free
endpoints.description: Primary CTA button for account registration (appears multiple times on page)

endpoints.label: Product Navigation
endpoints.description: Header navigation: Products, Solutions, Templates, Pricing, Enterprise with dropdown menus

endpoints.label: Templates Gallery
endpoints.description: Link to browse form/survey templates — part of product navigation or standalone nav link

endpoints.label: Cookie Consent
endpoints.description: Cookie consent banner with accept/manage buttons
